ops.text:
RESULTS (complete).

CL AUDIT (validated against cleanlab 2.9.0 — my hand-rolled confident-joint == cleanlab's, n_flagged overlap 73/73 = 100%):
- Population N=5475 v6 triage labels (non-quarantined); steer 3757 / nosteer 1718. Model mix: opus 4411 / gpt-5.5:medium 1056 / gemini 8.
- Proxy classifier (TF-IDF(text,1-2gram)+source_kind one-hot, 5-fold OOS LR, seed 1729): OOF AUC 0.969.
- Noise matrix P(given=i|true=j), order [nosteer,steer]: [[0.949, 0.0017],[0.0506, 0.998]] -> ~5.1% of true-steer are labeled nosteer; near-zero the other way. Calibrated joint Q=[[1712,6],[91,3666]]. Low overall noise.
- n_flagged (confident_learning filter) = 73 label issues (69 labeled-steer->CL-nosteer, 4 labeled-nosteer->CL-steer). cleanlab prune_by_noise_rate variant = 97.
- Top-100 suspects = all 73 flagged + 27 borderline controls (lowest self-confidence). gpt-5.5 over-represented among suspects (31/100 vs 19% base).
- E18 cross-ref (E18-vote-cache-reliability contested strata, 246 rows): 25/73 flagged (and 26/100) overlap contested — independent corroboration.

RE-JUDGE (opus, tier=large, prompt v6, fresh clone, 100/100 judged, 0 failed):
- PRIMARY (pre-registered) re-judge precision = flip rate among 73 flagged = 31/73 = 0.425, bootstrap 95% CI [0.315, 0.534].
- CRITERION >=0.60 NOT MET (0.425 < 0.60).
- BUT CL ranking has real signal: flagged 0.425 vs borderline-control 0.222 (~2x). And noise concentrates in cheap-model labels: gpt-5.5-labeled flagged flip 0.609 [0.391,0.783] (>=60%!) vs opus-labeled 0.340 [0.22,0.48]. steer->nosteer flagged 0.435 (30/69); nosteer->steer 0.250 (1/4).
- Top-100 confusion: orig-steer 86 -> 34 flipped nosteer; orig-nosteer 14 -> 3 flipped steer (37 total flips). 49/100 changed category even when is_steering held.
- Face validity: flips are genuine errors — inter-agent 'teammate-message' idle/status notifications mislabeled as steering (mostly gpt-5.5) -> opus relabels status_update/new_task; bare approvals ('Plan approved'), status reports ('I set the API key in .env'), forward directives ('write the plan out to disk') mislabeled direction/premature -> noise. Non-flips are reasonable (genuine questions, genuine decision-resolutions like 'go for it' opus re-confirmed as steering).

VERDICT: pre-registered success FALSE at the flagged level (0.425). Actionable finding: CL is a valid noise-ranker (2x separation vs control) and the training-label noise is concentrated in the ~1056 gpt-5.5:medium labels (flip 0.609); re-judging those at opus is the high-value cleaning target for E28.

SPEND: ~$2.5 (100 opus triage calls; 38 full + 62 summary fidelity). CL/analysis local (~$0). Under $10 cap.

ARTIFACTS (all under ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E20/out/): cleaned-labels.parquet (5475 rows, 100 re-judged, 37 labels changed; for E28), suspects_top100.parquet/.csv, rejudged_top100.parquet, cl_results.parquet, noise_matrix.json, summary.json. Scripts: E20/scripts/{cl_audit,rejudge,analyze}.py. Re-judge clone: E20/inputs/rejudge_clone.db.
